title: Unified Command Palette — AI Commands, Universal Search, Cmd+K Prominence
consumer_purpose: Make Cmd+K the single most powerful surface — a universal command palette with AI actions, categorized results, recent/favorites tracking, slash integration, and global hotkey prominence
claim_atoms: AI agent commands registered in command.tsx with custom event dispatch
Command palette evolved with category icons, recent/favorites, intent detection
Layout shows Cmd+K hint in titlebar area
Prompt input shows command palette results on / prefix
Cmd+K from prompt input shows full palette
content:
## Plan: Unified Command Palette (Lane 2)

### Files to modify:
1. **packages/app/src/context/command.tsx** — Add AI command registration with custom event dispatch, recent/favorites tracking
2. **packages/app/src/components/dialog-command-palette.tsx** — Evolve with category icons, recent/favorites sections, intent detection, descriptions
3. **packages/app/src/pages/layout.tsx** — Add Cmd+K hint badge in the layout header area
4. **packages/app/src/components/prompt-input.tsx** — Add slash command integration with AI commands from catalog, Cmd+K handler, updated placeholder

### Step-by-step:
1. In command.tsx: register AI commands (/explain, /refactor, /test, /fix, /deploy, /review, /commit, /search) with onSelect dispatching custom events. Add persisted recent/favorites tracking.
2. In dialog-command-palette.tsx: enhance UI with category icons, recent/favorites sections at top, intent detection (slash prefix, natural language routing), description display alongside titles. Track command usage for recents.
3. In layout.tsx: add a subtle "⌘K" badge in the layout shell header that hints at the command palette, with a tooltip.
4. In prompt-input.tsx: merge AI commands into the slash popover, handle Cmd+K to show full palette, update placeholder to mention Cmd+K.
